message:
chore(beads): close bead 2f3o - HTML export glassmorphism redesign complete

All requirements satisfied:
- Tool calls now render as Lucide SVG icon badges in message header
- Glassmorphism styling with backdrop blur, glow effects
- Terminal Noir design system with oklch colors
- Responsive breakpoints for mobile/desktop
- Light/dark theme support
